positive: A centralized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial fox surrounded by stylized constellations and swirling nebulas. The composition is highly clean and graphic, emphasizing strong, thick outlines and silhouettes. The primary color palette utilizes deep midnight blues, vibrant teals, luminous golds, and touches of cosmic lavender. Focus on a magical, detailed art deco/mythological aesthetic, rendered with high contrast for print readability. The background should be abstract and tonal, allowing the main subject to pop. Designed for maximal impact on fabric, clean lines, elegant symmetry, vector art quality.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, dirty, smudge, grain, noisy, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, trademark, writing, signature, cropped, low resolution, bad composition
